data.title: Crypto Fear & Greed Index Rises as Bitcoin Nears $77,920
data.description: The Alternative.me Crypto Fear & Greed Index increased by 14 points, reaching 46, marking its highest level in over three months. According to NS3.AI, this rise coincided with Bitcoin trading near $77,920 following a rally on Wednesday. CryptoQuant's head of research, Julio Moreno, attributed the movement to a surge in perpetual futures demand, despite a continued contraction in spot demand.

data.title: Apple Resolves Security Flaw Allowing FBI Access to Deleted Signal Previews
data.description: Apple has addressed a security vulnerability that permitted the FBI to access deleted Signal message previews from an iPhone's push notification database. According to NS3.AI, Apple announced in a security advisory on Wednesday that notifications intended for deletion could inadvertently remain on the device. Signal confirmed that the latest iOS update has resolved this issue.

data.title: A whale bought 7,447 ETH in 6 hours, worth $17.52 million.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), address 0x65B…5Ce93 purchased a total of 7447.7 ETH in the past 6 hours, with a transaction value of approximately $17.52 million. The average purchase cost of this address is approximately $2353, and it currently has a floating profit of approximately $24,000.

data.title: Pakistan Urges Continued Diplomacy Between Washington and Tehran
data.description: Pakistan's Ministry of Interior has emphasized the importance of maintaining diplomatic channels between Washington and Tehran to achieve a permanent resolution to ongoing conflicts. According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump's extension of the ceasefire is seen as a significant step towards easing tensions. Pakistan hopes for progress from Iran and encourages both parties to give diplomacy and peaceful solutions a chance.

data.title: Future Asset Allocation: Traditional Finance and Cryptocurrency
data.description: The future of asset allocation is expected to integrate traditional finance with cryptocurrency. According to PANews, experts suggest that the combination of these two financial sectors could offer diversified investment opportunities and enhance portfolio resilience. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, its role in asset management is becoming increasingly significant. Analysts believe that incorporating digital assets alongside conventional financial instruments could provide investors with a broader range of options and potentially higher returns. This shift reflects the growing acceptance of cryptocurrency as a legitimate component of global financial strategies.

data.title: PENGU Surges Over 7% After Breaking Key Trendline
data.description: PENGU has experienced a significant price movement, rising over 7% in the past 24 hours. According to NS3.AI, this increase follows the cryptocurrency's breakthrough above a descending trendline that had been in place since July 2025. The first Fibonacci resistance is identified near the $0.015030 mark, indicating potential levels for traders to watch.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Potential Downtrend Without Key SMA Recovery
data.description:
On April 23, renowned trader Killa (@KillaXBT) stated that Bitcoin must successfully reclaim and maintain above the 111-day Simple Moving Average (SMA) to confirm a trend reversal. According to BlockBeats, without this recovery, Bitcoin remains at risk of a significant pullback within the long-term bearish framework on weekly and monthly charts, making bullish positions inadvisable.

Killa, a quantitative trader focused on Bitcoin, accurately predicted the peak of the current bull market in May 2025. He has over 180,000 followers on the X platform. In mid-April, Killa shorted Bitcoin at $74,688, a position that is currently under pressure.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights Risks in Prediction Markets Due to Data Source Manipulation
data.description: Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of Ethereum, recently commented on X about the interference with weather sensors at Paris Airport, which affected prediction market outcomes. According to Odaily, Buterin emphasized the inherent risks of relying on a single data source for prediction markets. He suggested that using the median of at least three independent data sources could mitigate the risk of manipulation in data-driven prediction markets.

data.title: Input Output Seeks $46.8 Million from Cardano's Community Treasury
data.description: Input Output is requesting $46.8 million from Cardano's community treasury to support its operations this year. According to NS3.AI, this amount represents approximately half of the $97.5 million the company requested last year. The company has stated its intention to gradually decrease its reliance on community funding, aiming to eventually sustain its operations through its own revenue.

data.title: Pakistan: Hopes the US and Iran will give a chance for a diplomatic and peaceful solution.
data.description: Pakistan's Ministry of the Interior: We emphasized the necessity of continuing diplomatic channels between Washington and Tehran to reach a permanent solution to the conflict. Trump's extension of the ceasefire is an important step in easing tensions, and we look forward to progress from Iran, hoping both sides will give a chance for a diplomatic and peaceful solution. (Jinshi)

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Chinese Gold Jewelry Prices Remain Stable
data.description: On April 23, Jin10 reported that the prices of gold jewelry in China showed little change compared to the previous day. According to Jin10, several brands maintained their quotes within the range of 1,450 yuan per gram to 1,455 yuan per gram. Notably, Shuibei Gold Jewelry quoted a price of 1,204 yuan per gram today.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Calls for Enhanced Data Integrity in Prediction Markets
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin has commented on an incident involving a man using a hairdryer to manipulate the Polymarket Paris weather market, profiting approximately $34,000. According to Foresight News, Buterin emphasized that events like this, along with the Myrnohrad incident, highlight the necessity for critical systems to use the median from at least three independent sources as a basic requirement.

Foresight News notes that Myrnohrad is a significant town near Pokrovsk in Ukraine's Donetsk region, which was a hotspot on the Russia-Ukraine front line. Polymarket hosted several high-volume prediction markets, exceeding $1.3 million, betting on when Russian forces would fully occupy the city or specific junctions/train stations. Subsequently, the Institute for the Study of War's (ISW) interactive map of Ukraine's war situation was edited without authorization. The ISW stated that an analyst internally manipulated the map, which briefly showed Russian forces advancing and controlling a key intersection/area in Myrnohrad, although this did not occur. As a result, Polymarket used this map as a data source and judged the market as 'Yes' for Russian forces occupying the area ahead of time, leading to substantial returns for some bettors.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs See Continued Inflows Amid Market Activity
data.description: U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs experienced approximately $96.4 million in net inflows on April 22, marking a 10-day streak of positive flows. According to NS3.AI, data from Farside Investors indicated that BlackRock's ETHA and Fidelity's FETH were the primary contributors to these inflows, whereas Grayscale's ETHE saw an outflow.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Comments on Polymarket Cheating Incident
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin has expressed his views on the recent cheating incident involving Polymarket. According to BlockBeats, Buterin suggested that in such cases, it is essential to mandate the use of at least three or more independent sources to determine the median.

Previously, it was reported that a user manipulated data from a Paris weather collection terminal using a hairdryer to alter event outcomes, resulting in a profit of $34,000.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Australia Collaborates with Tech Firms to Address Emerging Vulnerabilities
data.description: Australia's Department of Home Affairs is actively working with software vendors and companies like Anthropic to ensure a comprehensive understanding of emerging vulnerabilities. According to Jin10, this collaboration aims to enhance the country's ability to address potential security challenges posed by new technologies. The initiative reflects a proactive approach to safeguarding national security in the face of rapidly evolving technological landscapes.

data.title: Newfire Technology acquires Avenir Group's transaction team and launches Bitcoin asset management services.
data.description: On April 22, Newfire Technology (1611.HK) announced that it will acquire the investment team and trading system of Avenir Group, the family office of Li Lin, for US$1.6 million. Following the acquisition, Newfire Technology plans to launch a Bitcoin-denominated asset management service called Alpha BTC, aiming to attract investments of over 10,000 Bitcoins, valued at approximately US$760 million, within one year. This strategy will generate returns through derivatives trading such as options, using Bitcoin or IBIT ETFs as underlying assets, targeting crypto-native investors and Hong Kong-based companies. As of the end of 2025, Avenir Group holds 18.3 million shares of BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Trust, valued at US$908 million.

data.description: 1. A bill limiting Trump's war powers was rejected by the US Senate for the fifth time; 2. A user profited $34,000 by interfering with Polymarket's temperature forecast market by heating weather sensors; 3. XChat's launch date was delayed again to April 24; 4. X product manager: The X platform's Community function will be migrated to XChat group chat, with the transition period ending on May 30. Group chats are planned to support a maximum of 1,000 people; 5. Kalshi fined and banned three US congressional candidates for 5 years; 6. Arthur Hayes: Bitcoin needs the Federal Reserve to restart the printing press to break $500,000; 9. Wang Chun: I sold 83.7 million SPK last year and now I regret it; 10. Bitmine is suspected of buying 100,000 ETH, worth... $233.7 million; 11. The U.S. government is running Bitcoin nodes to test network security; 12. data.title: The bill limiting Trump's war powers was rejected by the US Senate for the fifth time.
data.description: The U.S. Senate on Tuesday rejected another bill limiting President Trump's war powers. This marks the fifth time the Senate has rejected a bill aimed at restricting Trump's authority to use force against Iran since the U.S. launched military action against Iran in late February. (Xinhua)

data.title: X Communities to Be Deprecated in Favor of XChat Group Chats
data.description: X product lead Nikita Bier announced that X Communities will be deprecated on May 30, with users being transitioned to XChat group chats. According to NS3.AI, Bier stated that XChat now supports joinable links, and each chat currently accommodates 350 members. The member limit is set to increase to 500 tomorrow, with plans to eventually support up to 1,000 members.

data.title: U.S. Senate Rejects Proposal to Limit Trump's War Powers Again
data.description: The U.S. Senate has once again rejected a proposal aimed at restricting U.S. President Donald Trump's authority to engage in military actions against Iran. According to Odaily, this marks the fifth time since late February, when the U.S. initiated military actions against Iran, that the Senate has voted down measures intended to limit Trump's war powers concerning Iran.
